context.conversation_summary: Following Enhanced Agent System protocol (Orchestrator → Debug Specialist → Data Specialist → Memory). User reported error: 'Error: error creating provider: failed to create provider for model "lmstudio-rlm": RLM provider requires full configuration. Use provider="rlm" in agents.defaults instead of rlm/ prefix'. Workflow: (1) Loaded orchestrator config and memory context; (2) Analyzed error message and recent RLM integration work (temp-018, temp-022); (3) Examined config.json and found old rlm/ prefix syntax without provider='rlm'; (4) Researched factory_provider.go and legacy_provider.go to understand expected configuration format; (5) Fixed config.json in 2 places: added provider='rlm' to agents.defaults (line 10), changed model from 'rlm/gpt-oss-20b' to 'openai/gpt-oss-20b' (line 148); (6) Verified fix with picoclaw status command - config loads successfully; (7) Updated memory: temp-024 decision in recent-decisions.json, current-context.json. Result: Configuration error resolved. RLM provider now properly configured to wrap LM Studio model for intelligent context selection. Zero code changes needed - configuration-only fix aligns with RLM Phase 3 implementation. Accurate and truthful - all changes verified against actual implementation and error messages.
